title: Ecologics - Farmer's Delight - Bark Cutting Compat
description: Adds Compatibility Between Ecologics & Farmer's Delight
body:
Adds Support Between [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics) & [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

[CurseForge Version Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/ecologics-farmers-delight-bark-cutting-compat)

[Fabric Version of Farmer's Delight Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)

Normally, when you try to cut modded wood types with a cutting board, a message appears saying, 'Doesn't seem cuttable...' However, with this datapack, it simply cuts the wood and gives you bark!

Both Mods Are Required!

Types:


- Azalea,

- Coconut,

- Flowering Azalea,

- Walnut.

All Types have,


- Door,

- Hanging Sign,

- Log,

- Sign,

- Trapdoor,

- And Wood Types!

# THIS IS A DATAPACK!

How to Download:

1. Download the file.

2. Add it to the datapacks folder or use a loader (links below).

3. Start your world.

Links:

- [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi)

- [Open Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-loader)

- [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)
